{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lirial Source
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] can tap into her [[Lirial Source]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
